title: Diore
body:
## Diore
Diamond-based economy plugin.​

## Feature list
* Transactions - Track, record, and manage in-game transactions seamlessly, enabling a smooth user experience for trading, purchasing, and more.
* Menus - Intuitive and fully customizable menus, giving users easy access to transaction details, settings, and other key information - accesed using /balance.
* [Messages](https://github.com/Ximronno/Diore/wiki/Messages) - Customize all in-game messages with full multilingual support, ensuring tailored communication for your users.
* [SQL](https://github.com/Ximronno/Diore/wiki/SQL) - Fully integrated MySQL support for efficient data storage, providing high performance, scalability, and cross-server syncing.
* Leaderboards - Dynamic leaderboards with sorting options, allowing for real-time competition and engagement.
## Supported plugins
- Vault - allows you to use Diore economy with existing plugins
  
## Dependencies
Diore has no required plugin dependencies, but **Java 17 is required**.

## Wiki and Documentation
[Click here to view the Wiki and Documentation](https://github.com/Ximronno/Diore/wiki)

You can find info about Configuration, Messages, Commands, Permissions on the Wiki.

## Installation
How to install the plugin:
* Place the jar you downloaded into your plugins folder
* Restart the server (Do not reload)
